prompt: Based on this depth map, render a computer graphics scene. Show two figures, one dynamic and one standing, in an environment, adding realistic textures and lighting effects to create a full image.
prompt_refined: Generate a complete computer graphics scene using the depth map provided in image 1 as a structural reference. The scene must feature two full-body figures within an indoor environment, such as a studio or a simple room. Specifically, render a dynamic figure on the left, posed in mid-action with an extended leg and arms, and a stationary figure on the right, standing upright with one hand near its head. Apply realistic textures, detailed shading, and naturalistic lighting effects to all elements, creating a fully rendered computer graphics image.
objects: Indoor environment (e.g., studio or simple room)
Dynamic full-body figure on the left
Extended leg of the dynamic figure
Extended arms of the dynamic figure
Stationary full-body figure on the right
Hand of the stationary figure near its head
